name: dat-copilot-bridge
description: Bridges the DAT AI Test Case Generator web tool to GitHub Copilot Chat, so QA testers without a GitHub Copilot API key can still use their VS Code Copilot subscription for AI test case generation.

commands.title: DAT Copilot Bridge: Start Bridge Server
DAT Copilot Bridge: Stop Bridge Server
DAT Copilot Bridge: List Available Copilot Models

datCopilotBridge.port.description: Local port the bridge HTTP server listens on. Must match COPILOT_BRIDGE_URL in the DAT AI Test Case Generator's .env file.

datCopilotBridge.modelFamily.description: Preferred Copilot model family (e.g. gpt-4o, claude-3.5-sonnet). Leave empty to use whichever model vscode.lm selects by default.

datCopilotBridge.autoStart.description: Automatically start the bridge server when VS Code launches.

datCopilotBridge.autoQuitOnNodeServerExi.description: Automatically quit VS Code once the DAT AI Test Case Generator's Node server (registered via /register-node-port) stops responding — e.g. the user closed the tool's cmd window.

datCopilotBridge.watchdogIntervalMs.description: How often (ms) the watchdog checks the Node server's /api/health endpoint.

datCopilotBridge.watchdogFailureThreshol.description: Number of consecutive failed health checks before the bridge quits VS Code.
